# NSStackTraceKey

**Global Variable**

The key for fetching the stack trace (an [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/NSString] object) in the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/NSException/userInfo-swift.property] dictionary of the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/NSException] object passed into one of the delegate methods described in [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/ExceptionHandling/nsexceptionhandlerdelegate#Logging-and-handling-exceptions].

## Declaration

```swift
let NSStackTraceKey: String
```

## Constants

- **NSUncaughtRuntimeErrorException**: Identifies an Objective-C runtime error.
- **NSUncaughtSystemExceptionException**: Identifies an uncaught system exception.
title: NSStackTraceKey
